_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: ʻōlelo i ka hoaaloha, a komo.
speakFriend.description: Ua kūkulu ʻia ʻo Liana Banyan e wehe ana no kēlā me kēia ʻōlelo. He uku hoʻolilo kekahi no kēlā me kēia ʻōlelo.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Ua hāʻawi ʻia nā Marks (nā hōʻailona kākoʻo)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: He panee ka papa inoa ʻōlelo a me nā huina Marks. He hōʻailona kākoʻo nā Marks, ʻaʻole palena.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: E unuhi iā Liana Banyan i ka ʻōlelo {{language}}. E loaʻa {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Nā hōʻailona alakaʻi a me nā leka hewa
speakFriend.scopeWildfire: Wildfire Beacon Run: ʻImi i kahi hana
speakFriend.claimBounty: E koi i kēia Uku Unuhi
speakFriend.baseLanguage: ʻŌlelo kumu -- ʻaʻohe uku e pono ai.
speakFriend.claimedBy: Ua koi ʻia e @{{handle}} -- e hele ana.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Leo o ka Mea Hoʻokumu: No ke Aha nā Hua Palapala
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: He kumu ko ia hua palapala o kēia kahua. Ke kumu o nā inoa 26 koʻikoʻi.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Pehea e hana ai nā Uku Unuhi
speakFriend.step1Body: E wehe i ka Uku Unuhi mai Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: E unuhi i nā kaula like ʻole. E hāʻawi ma Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Ma hope o ke kāpono, loaʻa nā Marks a e hoʻopaʻa ʻia i ka IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "I aku he hoaloha, e komo mai."

languageSwitcher.tip: E hoʻohana i nā hua huna ʻōlelo ʻokoʻa ma ka Puka o Durin e wehe ai i nā moʻolelo kūʻiʻo!
